mapper.select:
SELECT id, exam_paper_id, examinee_name, examinee_no, started_at, submitted_at, total_score FROM exam_session
AND exam_paper_id = #{paperId}
AND examinee_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{examineeName}, '%')
ORDER BY started_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_session (exam_paper_id, examinee_name, examinee_no) VALUES (#{examPaperId}, #{examineeName}, #{examineeNo})
